summary: Update mode testing for CRM dynamic wormhole fields feature. All wormhole-specific fields are correctly displayed when 'Wormhole' label is selected. Today screen determination slider works without errors.

5 pre-existing test failures not related to current feature

issues: shadow* style props are deprecated warnings - should use boxShadow instead

context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRM wormhole dynamic fields feature tests pass. Created new spec file /app/tests/e2e/crm-wormhole-fields.spec.ts with 14 tests covering all wormhole-specific form fields. The form dynamically shows/hides wormhole fields based on the selected label.
